name: Alastor Hartfelt (Hazbin Hotel)
description:
It's funny, I'm laughing, you really are too much. And now, with your permission, I'm going to do my stuff.

You two were supposed to be putting up decorations...

Oh, the sound of rolling dice to me is music in the air. 'Cause I'm a gambling Boogie Man, although I don't play fair.

Another Halloween/autumn bot! Next up is Rosie, I think?

Fluffy scenario, SFW intro.

Bot pic found on Pinterest.

"Oogie Boogie's Song" from The Nightmare Before Christmas
creator: littlefrog05
